heading: Authority to carry out small projects with operation and maintenance funds
label: 18233b Authority to carry out small projects with operation and maintenance funds
text: Under such regulations as the Secretary of Defense may prescribe, the Secretary may expend, from appropriations available for operation and maintenance, amounts necessary to carry out any project authorized under that costs not more than the amount specified in .section 18233(a) of this titlesection 2805(c) of this title
notes: Amendments2011— substituted “not more than the amount specified in .” for “not more than—Pub. L. 112–81section 2805(c) of this title“(1) the amount specified in , in the case of a project intended solely to correct a deficiency that is life-threatening, health-threatening, or safety-threatening; orsection 2805(c)(1)(A) of this title“(2) the amount specified in , in the case of any other project.”section 2805(c)(1)(B) of this title
